hero.title: Was this photo taken by a real person, or generated by AI?
hero.description: Upload an image. TrueLens uses deep learning + metadata analysis to estimate AI-generation probability and provide evidence. 88.9% accuracy, results in seconds.

upload.dropHint: Tap to upload or take a photo
upload.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, up to 10MB
upload.quotaExhaustedHint: Daily free limit reached. Results are for reference only.
upload.quotaInfo: This will use your daily free quota ({quota} remaining)
upload.quotaExhaustedBtn: Daily free limit reached. You can still detect, but consider upgrading to Pro.

result.disclaimer: TrueLens results are for reference only and do not constitute legal evidence. AI detection technology is still evolving and may produce errors.

share.copySuccess: Copied to clipboard. Paste anywhere to share.
share.title: TrueLens AI Detection Result
share.copyTemplate:
🔍 TrueLens AI Detection Result

📊 AI Probability: {aiProbability}%
🔔 Verdict: {verdict}
⚡ Confidence: {confidence}%

🕵️ Try it: https://truelens.top

feedback.title: Was this accurate?
feedback.thanksDesc: We'll keep improving our detection engine 💪
feedback.modalDesc: Tell us what you think, and help us improve the detection engine.
feedback.modalPlaceholder: e.g., This is a real photo but was flagged as AI...

deepLearning.title: Deep Learning
deepLearning.desc: ViT vision model analyzes pixel-level features to detect AI generation traces

exifAnalysis.title: Metadata Analysis
exifAnalysis.desc: Checks EXIF camera info, GPS, timestamps and other metadata integrity

fastResult.title: Results in Seconds
fastResult.desc: Multi-engine parallel detection, average 2-3 seconds for probability score and evidence

evidence.no_exif_detail_ai: Image contains no metadata. AI-generated images typically lack EXIF data.
evidence.no_exif_detail_real: Image contains no metadata. Real camera photos usually have camera info.
evidence.camera_fields_few_detail: Only {count} camera fields found. May be a compressed real photo.
evidence.no_camera_info_detail: No camera brand, model, aperture or other metadata detected.
evidence.engine_unavailable_detail: All detection engines failed to return results. Please try again later.

errors.invalidImage: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP)
errors.quotaExhausted: Daily free limit reached. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited detection →
errors.timeout: Detection timed out. Please retry. The model may still be loading.
errors.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your connection and retry.
errors.proComing: Pro coming soon: Unlimited detection + Video detection + Detailed reports

api.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
api.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type: {type}. Only JPG, PNG, WebP are supported.
api.fileTooSmall: Image file is too small and may be corrupted.
api.noEngine: Detection engine not configured on server.
api.unknownError: An unknown error occurred during detection.
api.modelLoading: Model is still loading. Please wait a few seconds and retry.
api.hfMissingFields: HF API response missing required fields.

metadata.title: TrueLens — AI Image Authenticity Detection
metadata.description: Upload an image and instantly determine if it's a real photo or AI-generated. Based on deep learning + EXIF metadata analysis, providing probability scores and evidence.
metadata.ogDescription: Instantly determine if an image is real or AI-generated, with probability scores and evidence.
metadata.keywords: AI detection, image authenticity, deepfake, AI-generated detection, TrueLens, AI image recognition
